summary: GobbleCube, a Gurugram-based AI startup for digital commerce, raised $15 million in a Series A round led by Susquehanna Venture Capital, with participation from InfoEdge Ventures and Kae Capital.

IndiGo Ventures Fund invested approximately Rs 10 crore in Sarla Aviation, an eVTOL air-taxi startup, to support its operating and expansion needs.

Polaris Smart Metering Private Limited secured Rs 710 crore (≈$80 million) in financing from British International Investment to expand its smart meter deployment in West Bengal and other Indian states.
